info.name: My Franchise
info.description:
**Important:** The My Franchise screen is currently backed by mock data in `src/services/myFranchiseService.ts` (`USE_MOCK_MY_FRANCHISE_API`). These routes are **not** yet defined in `src/remote/apiPaths.ts`. This collection documents a **proposed REST contract** that matches the existing TypeScript types and UI behavior so the backend can align before `apiPaths` + service are updated.

**Auth:** Bearer `{{authToken}}` (same as `apiRequest`).

**Base URL:** `baseUrl` = `AppConstant.BASE_URL`.

---

### Proposed endpoints

1. **`GET /my-franchise/box-data`** — Single call returning all four datasets the dashboard needs (equivalent to `fetchMyFranchiseBoxData()`).

2. **Status toggles** — `PUT` per resource type with body `{ "is_active": boolean }` (equivalent to `setEmployeeActive`, `setAreaActive`, `setServiceActive`, `setCategoryActive`). **Note:** `apiRequest` in `src/remote/apiHelper.ts` currently allows only `GET` | `POST` | `PUT` | `DELETE`; use `PUT` from the app unless you extend the helper to support `PATCH`.

---

### Types (from service)

- **EmployeeRow:** `_id`, `employee_id`, `name`, `role`, `phone`, `email`, `area_name`, `is_active`
- **AreaRow:** `_id`, `area_name`, `city_name`, `state_name`, `pincode`, `is_active`
- **ServiceRow:** `_id`, `service_id`, `name`, `category_name`, `is_active`
- **CategoryRow:** `_id`, `category_id`, `name`, `is_active`

**Mock seeds:** `src/mockData/myFranchiseMockData.ts`

---

### Backend implementation checklist

- Add paths to `ApiPaths` and switch `myFranchiseService` off mock mode.
- Return shapes compatible with the examples below (either `data` wrapper or nested `data.data` if you follow the same pattern as other list APIs).

item.name: Get box data (employees, areas, services, categories)

request.description:
**Proposed:** `PUT /my-franchise/employees/:id` (or `PATCH` if you extend `apiRequest`).

**Body:** `{ "is_active": boolean }`

**Success:** 2xx with optional `message`; client expects boolean success like `setEmployeeActive`.
